text: Delivery boy ne 100 rupaye extra liye COD pe, app pe kam dikha raha tha.
Maine 12 din pehle return kiya tha par abhi tak refund nahi aaya.
Ye iPhone duplicate lag raha hai, original seal nahi tha.
Maggi ki expiry date nikal chuki hai, kaise use karu?
Wrong item delivered, maine atta order kiya tha par salt aa gaya.
Phone delivery me screen crack ho gayi, box bhi damaged tha.
The OnePlus I received looks counterfeit, logo and box are different.
Refund of 21999 initiated last month is still not credited.
